prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to Roush Performance TVS2650 supercharger kit (engine code: Coyote 5.0L V8, Gen 3) with 10.5 psi boost, forged internals including Manley H-beam connecting rods and Mahle forged pistons, and a custom Lund Racing Stage 3+ ECU calibration for 850+ WHP on E85 fuel

Full exhaust system overhaul with Borla Atak cat-back exhaust (3.5" diameter, T-304 stainless steel) paired with JBA long-tube headers (1-7/8" primaries, 3" collectors) and a custom X-pipe with Vibrant 1799 resonators for optimized scavenging and backpressure reduction

Suspension and handling package featuring Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 20-way compression/rebound adjustability) with RTR-spec sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), Whiteline adjustable rear subframe bushings, and a Ford Performance MagneRide suspension recalibration for aggressive track use
estetica: RTR Spec-5 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and front splitter) with aggressive 30mm extended wheel arches, paired with a custom RTR carbon fiber hood featuring dual heat extractors and a 2.5" cowl induction scoop

Custom RTR Aerodynamics package including a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated brake cooling ducts, adjustable carbon fiber GT3-style rear wing (200mm chord, 30° angle of attack), and front canards from the RTR Spec-3D aero kit for improved downforce

Wheel and brake setup with Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" (front) and 20x11" (rear) forged wheels (ET +25 front, ET +40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (400mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (380mm rotors) big brake kit with RTR-branded caliper covers
